currentFocus: Static RE/Ghidra state is unchanged. The rebuild front-door chain map is integrated as routing documentation, and the next repo slice remains PatchBench/BinaryPatchesPage test hardening rather than RE mutation.

staticClosure.latestGhidraReviewBackup: maintainer-local descriptor only; keep full backup paths outside tracked state
staticClosure.latestLiveProject: maintainer-local descriptor only; see LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md for local-only Ghidra placement
staticClosure.latestLiveStore: maintainer-local descriptor only; see LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md for local-only Ghidra placement

publicPrimaryBoundary: The public repo is primary for RE docs, wave notes, scratch text exports, function indexes, static maps, proof summaries, and checkers. Hard payloads, full Ghidra DBs/backups, raw captures, copied executables, secrets, build output, and package output remain local/ignored per LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md.

runtimeProofBoundary.musicStatus: Music producer/materializer/checker infrastructure exists, but there is no accepted live BEA audible-output bundle. See CURRENT_CAPABILITIES.md for current proof-gate detail.
runtimeProofBoundary.onlineMultiplayer: not player-ready; Host/Join remains disabled until required distinct-endpoint command-source proof and source-bound copied-runtime causality proof are both accepted
runtimeProofBoundary.releaseStatus: v1.0.7 is the current published portable WinUI ZIP; use README.MD and release/readiness/winui_zip_release_v1_0_7_2026-06-25.md for release evidence instead of live state detail.
runtimeProofBoundary.staticReClosureBoundary: Static closure is not runtime, gameplay, visual, online, rebuild, or no-noticeable-difference proof.

currentCounters.catalogRows: 29/29 target specimen identity and policy metadata rows

validation.stateRefresh: Integration state refresh only; no Ghidra mutation, runtime proof, generated rebuild code, hard payload, product behavior change, release publication, installed-game mutation, or original-BEA mutation.
validation.currentGateExpectation: For this integration, use JSON parse, stale local campaign path scans, git diff --check, required docs/repo safety gates, focused PatchBench tests, patch-engine safety, and canonical WinUI primary-lane validation.

nextSteps: Keep static RE mutation paused unless a product/runtime contradiction points back to a specific RE issue.
Use the next bounded repo slice for PatchBench/BinaryPatchesPage test hardening.
Use the rebuild front-door chain map as routing documentation only; do not claim runtime, visual, gameplay, rebuild, or no-noticeable-difference parity from it.
Keep local Ghidra, proof, copied-runtime, and payload details as maintainer-local descriptors or ignored overlays, not tracked state.
